name: Meringues Aux Noix Cookies/Low Cal
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixer bowl, beat egg whites, lemon juice, and salt on low speed until foamy.
2. Gradually increase the speed and continue beating to high peaks.
3. Add the other ingredients one at a time, continuing to beat at high speed, scraping the edges of the bowl until the mixture forms stiff peaks.
4. Use a pastry bag with a plain tip to squeeze 1x4-inch strips onto a cookie sheet lined with brown paper.
5. Bake at 200°C for 1 hour.
6. Turn off the heat but do not open the oven door. Let the cookies dry for at least 2 hours or overnight.
7. Carefully remove with a spatula and store in an air-tight container.
